user.title: Configure Ghiseul.ro
user.description:
Enter your Ghiseul.ro account credentials.

This integration requires the FlareSolverr add-on to be installed and running to bypass Cloudflare protection on ghiseul.ro.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Ghiseul.ro
reauth_confirm.description: Authentication for account {username} failed. Please enter the correct password.

error.flaresolverr_unavailable: FlareSolverr is not reachable. Make sure the FlareSolverr add-on is installed and running.
